question: Q1
reason: The paper proposes std::rebind and rebind_t as new language/library features. The cited evidence from §4.1 is a code block showing the proposed syntax in use (std::rebind<double>(af), std::rebind_t<double, ...>, etc.), which appears verbatim in the paper. The applicability rule is met (the paper proposes a feature), and the evidence rule is met (a code block showing the proposed syntax/API in use).
